##LOCALITY=Esquire No. 7 Claim, Big Creek, Fresno County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Scattered orange grains and aggregates associated with taramellite, walstromite and sanbornite.

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
